title: Razor Trail Survivors
description:
Razor Trail Survivors is a semi-idle, persistent multiplayer survival strategy game set in a brutal post-apocalyptic wasteland. Build a settlement, equip your survivors, and carve out your place in a world that never pauses.

• Survive the wasteland — Manage a roster of survivors in a semi-idle, persistent post-apocalyptic world that never pauses.

• Gather & craft — Harvest resources across locations and craft gear and equipment with semi-random quality, levels, mods, etc.

• Seize & build — Claim territory tiers, expand your base with buildings like Garden, Warehouse, Barracks, Logistics, and more.

• Fight — Real-time-driven combat against wasteland enemies and other players (optional).

• Factions, bounties & world events — Band together, hunt bounties, and take part in server-wide events.

• Play anywhere — One persistent account across desktop (Steam), web, and mobile.
description_short: A semi-idle survival strategy set in a persistent post-apocalyptic wasteland. Recruit survivors, gather resources and craft equipment, seize territory and build your base — and fight other players if you choose. One account across desktop, web, and mobile.
